title: verbascum × leucophylloides
intro: Verbascum × leucophylloides, also known as the Snowy Mullein, is a hybrid plant species derived from the Verbascum genus, characterized by its white-hairy foliage. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Verbascum × leucophylloides include its ability to alleviate symptoms of bronchitis, asthma, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve wound healing. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, tinctures, and ointments, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its therapeutic benefits.
